calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING
Off Calendar Dec-24-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Randi Teichman for and with Danny Ortega (Trustee).

Ms. Teichman stated that the Trust is not under Court supervision and that there are no objections. The Court granted the Petition for Settlement of Account (subject to review of the order).

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Anasse. Not reported.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING
Off Calendar Dec-03-2018 Continued To Dec-17-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING
Off Calendar Oct-22-2018 Continued To Dec-03-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING
Off Calendar Sep-05-2018 Continued To Oct-22-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING
Off Calendar Sep-05-2018 Continued To Oct-17-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Randi Teichman for and with Danny Ortega.

The Court stated that it can allow the accounting, that if the parties want to have it approved they need to provide verification of the cash on hand at the beginning of the accounting period and original bank statements, and raised the issue of the informal accountings reflecting distributions made that were not in the percentage shares set forth in the trust. Ms. Teichman stated that initially when Paula passed away distributions were made that were disproportioned, that this is reflected in the first accounting, that she told the Court they would make it up in the next accounting and that she can file a declaration. Ms. Teichman also stated that they have difficult Beneficiaries, and that they have cancelled checks, but the Beneficiaries are not providing receipts. Mr. Ortega stated that three cousins are the primary beneficiaries, then his three children, the Goddaughter and two younger boys of a close family friend. The Petition for Settlement of Account is continued to October 17, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Wu. Not reported.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING
Off Calendar Aug-08-2018 Continued To Sep-05-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
